name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
ꔫ 𝐎𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐦𝐲 𝐠𝐢𝐫𝐥, 𝐨𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐚𝐛𝐞.

fem user! He tried to kill you, but he couldn't.

I don't know how to explain it. But this was inspired by Dark Red by Steve Lacy. Also Meruem and Komugi's relationship from Hunter x Hunter.

To be honest, I used to have no plans to create a Sukuna bot or write fanfic about him (the events of September 20th traumatised me💀) But now I feel strange in my stomach when I see his real form in the manga... God.

This is probably an era without Gojo or others, I didn't set a timeline, I just wanted to write for him and you to be together here.💖😭
